title: Select current benchmark context over obsolete live-baseline claims

items.text: Obsolete draft: top-k live baseline results alone prove real-world job suite wins.
Current policy: live-baseline reports remain valid for Docker retrieval and lifecycle checks, but they are not real-world job suite wins. Real-world job reports must be published separately.

answer.content: Use the current boundary: live-baseline reports stay valid for Docker retrieval and lifecycle evidence, but they are not real-world job suite wins; publish real-world job reports separately.

claims.text: Live-baseline reports are not real-world job suite wins.

timeline.summary: A draft conflated live-baseline retrieval checks with real-world job wins.
The current policy separates live-baseline evidence from real-world job suite claims.

prompt.content: Can I cite the live-baseline pass as a real-world job suite win?

must_include.text: Live-baseline reports are not real-world job suite wins.

must_not_include: Top-k live baseline results alone prove real-world job suite wins.

required_evidence.quote: they are not real-world job suite wins

answer_correctness.criteria: Answers with the current claim boundary.

uncertainty_handling.criteria: Does not hedge when sufficient current evidence exists.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.
